Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We are given an event log with three traces cases Lets analyze the behavior Case 1 RA VF AE RMI VF AD SC AC Case 2 RA VF AE AD SC AC Case 3 RA VF AE RMI RMI VF AD SC AC

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We observe that Every case starts with Receive Application RA and ends with Archive Case AC After RA we always have Validate Form VF and then Assess Eligibility AE After AE sometimes we have a loop Request Missing Info RMI followed by Validate Form VF This loop can occur multiple times as in case 3 RMI twice then VF After the loop or if no loop then after AE we have Approval Decision AD then Send Confirmation SC and finally Archive Case AC

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Therefore the process tree should have A main sequence RA to something to AC The part between RA and AC has a fixed beginning VF AE and fixed ending AD SC AC and in the middle there is an optional loop RMI followed by VF that can repeat zero or more times

Name: Deductive Reasoning - IND
Text: We can model the loop as a loop operator where A is the activity Request Missing Info RMI and B is the activity Validate Form VF But note the loop operator in the definition is execute A then either you exit the loop or you execute B and then A again

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Wait lets look at case 3 again AE RMI first RMI second VF so we have zero or more RMIs followed by a VF

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Therefore we cannot model the loop as above because we have consecutive RMIs without a VF in between Therefore we must model the loop as a repetition of RMI without VF in the loop body and then after the loop we have VF

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: So the structure is RMI star then VF

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The loop operator executes A at least once so to model zero or more we need to model the entire loop as an optional part We can use an XOR to choose between doing the loop or not So loop part equals XOR tau and loop of one or more RMIs then sequence that with VF

Name: Validation - PE
Text: This means either skip do nothing or do the loop of one or more RMIs and then VF and then do AD SC AC If we skip we do AD SC AC That matches case2 And for case1 and case3 we do the loop and VF and then AD SC AC

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: So the entire process tree becomes sequence RA then sequence VF then XOR of branch one sequence AE AD SC AC and branch two sequence AE then loop over RMI then VF then AD then SC then AC

Name: Validation - PE
Text: For case1 RA VF AE RMI VF AD SC AC For case3 the loop produces two RMIs and then VF so RA VF AE RMI RMI VF AD SC AC Perfect

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Final tree representation sequence RA then sequence VF then XOR of sequence AE then sequence AD then sequence SC AC and sequence AE then sequence loop RMI with sequence tau RMI then sequence VF then sequence AD then sequence SC AC
